name: nutriref
description: Pay-per-call USDA nutrition data for AI agents (x402 + USDC on Base).
long_description: NutriRef exposes the USDA FoodData Central nutrition database as four MCP tools (nutrition_search, nutrition_detail, nutrition_compare, nutrition_recipe). Each call charges $0.001-$0.005 in USDC on Base mainnet via the x402 micropayment protocol — no signup, no API keys. Returns normalized per-100g nutrition across 13 tracked nutrients.

tools.name: nutrition_search
tools.description: Search USDA foods by name; returns fdc_id and macros. Costs $0.001 USDC.

tools.name: nutrition_detail
tools.description: Full per-100g nutrition (13 nutrients) for one food by fdc_id. Costs $0.002 USDC.

tools.name: nutrition_compare
tools.description: Compare 2-5 foods side by side with per-nutrient winners. Costs $0.003 USDC.

tools.name: nutrition_recipe
tools.description: Scale and sum nutrition across weighted ingredients. Costs $0.005 USDC.

payer_private_key.title: Payer wallet private key
payer_private_key.description: Private key (0x-prefixed, 64 hex chars) of a Base mainnet wallet holding USDC. The wallet pays for each tool call. Use a dedicated wallet funded only with what you're willing to spend.

nutriref_base_url.title: NutriRef base URL
nutriref_base_url.description: Production API base URL. Only override for self-hosted instances.
